body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Update compat to allow CTS v0.9, so that nightly AMIP can run tonight
Update dependencies
Tag patch release 1.7.1

## Dependency updates
```
    Updating `~/clima/ClimaLand.jl/.buildkite/Project.toml`
  [13f3f980] ↑ CairoMakie v0.15.9 ⇒ v0.15.10
  [3a4d1b5c] ↑ ClimaComms v0.6.10 ⇒ v0.6.11
  [1ecacbb8] ↑ ClimaDiagnostics v0.3.4 ⇒ v0.3.5
  [5c42b081] ↑ ClimaParams v1.0.16 ⇒ v1.0.17
  [595c0a79] ↑ ClimaTimeSteppers v0.8.11 ⇒ v0.9.0
  [682c06a0] ↑ JSON v1.5.0 ⇒ v1.5.2
```


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

title: (1.8.0) allow CTS v0.9; up deps
